subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! There hath descended upon thee that which hath caused faces to be covered with dust and hearts to melt. We beseech God that He may grant thee solace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی قد ورد علیک ما تغبرت به الوجوه و ذابت به الاکباد نسئل الله ان یعزیک
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @soul; spirit after death, @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
